name: The Veil Torn in Two
oracleText:
Creatures you control have ward {1}.
Whenever one or more creatures you control die, you gain 1 life and scry 1.
flavorText: "The veil of the temple was rent in twain from the top to the bottom." — Matthew 27:51
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "What Our Lord Saw from the Cross" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, What Our Lord Saw from the Cross
classics.sourceNotes: This crucifixion perspective supports the torn-veil event with the right sacred severity.
